title: Rugburn
description: Short and simple resource pack with the purpose of retexturing the netherrack block to look closer to the old version of the block, while still being visually consistent with the modern textures.
body:
This pack retextures netherrack to look a little bit more gross and fleshy, which I personally felt was lacking from the new variant. 

Comes with 3 different variations, in order to avoid using random rotation.

![Nether Wastes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d7862d4fefced39c9927370f3afd0c7323424aed.webp)
